raw_consumer_statement:
This fraud dispute was opened on XX/XX/XXXX. Citibank has failed to close this dispute within the required 90-day window as required by the FCRA. 

I pointed out in my letter of XX/XX/XXXX when and where I believe the card was skimmed. 
I have twice sent signed statements ( XX/XX/XXXX, XX/XX/XXXX ) that I did not authorize this transaction. 

Ive twice spoken with XXXX XXXX ( XX/XX/XXXX, XX/XX/XXXX ), both times I stated that I did not know anyone named on the merchant response. 

In my letter of XX/XX/XXXX, I asked why Citibank approved this transaction on XX/XX/XXXX, when the card had already been cancelled on XX/XX/XXXX as compromised. I have not received an answer to that question. 

In the same letter of XX/XX/XXXX, I asked what name was present in the track data of the transaction. Again, I have not received an answer. I believe that the track data proves this was a cloned card and according to Citibank 's merchant agreement, responsibility for this fraudulent mag stripe transaction falls clearly on the merchant.
